project.name: DocStudio
project.description: Bộ công cụ xử lý tài liệu đa ngôn ngữ (VN/EN/JP): tạo chứng chỉ, dịch văn bản pháp lý, dịch văn bản dài (EJV), xử lý PDF, template overlay, Excel mapping, user guide

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS 3 + Vanilla CSS + Inline styles

deployment.ci_cd: GitHub → Cloudflare auto-deploy on push to main

tabs.name: Certificate Pages
tabs.description: Tạo phiếu chứng chỉ/kiểm nghiệm từ JSON, đa ngôn ngữ, SVG stamps, multi-page

tabs.name: Legal Documents
tabs.description: Dịch thuật và hiển thị văn bản pháp lý, Markdown rendering, citation stripping

tabs.name: EJV Translator
tabs.description: Dịch văn bản dài với batching, A4 pagination, page numbers, format styles (official/academic), block-based rendering

tabs.name: Template Overlay
tabs.description: HTML template + JSON data → render preview → in PDF. Redesigned layout.

tabs.name: PDF Splitter
tabs.description: Tách trang PDF, chọn trang, tải riêng/ghép

tabs.name: PDF Merger
tabs.description: Ghép nhiều file PDF thành 1 file, drag & drop reorder

tabs.name: Excel Mapping
tabs.description: Map đơn hàng khách ↔ mẫu NCC, auto-map, 3-zone edit, formula edit, profile, export

tabs.name: User Guide
tabs.description: Hướng dẫn sử dụng đa ngôn ngữ cho các tab, accordion UI

shared_components.DocToolbar: src/components/DocToolbar.jsx — Unified toolbar for tabs 1-4: Lang selector, Google Font Picker, Edit toggle, Zoom, DOCX/PDF export. Accent color per tab.
shared_components.GoogleFontPicker: src/components/GoogleFontPicker.jsx — Searchable Google Fonts dropdown with lazy loading, 30+ curated fonts, CJK support.
shared_components.ZoneEditor: src/components/ZoneEditor.jsx — Editable zone for Excel header/footer

tab1_certificate.description: Tạo phiếu chứng chỉ/kiểm nghiệm từ JSON data

tab2_legal.description: Dịch thuật và hiển thị văn bản pháp lý

tab3_ejv_translator.description: Dịch văn bản dài từ Gemini JSON với batch append

tab4_template_overlay.description: HTML template + JSON → render preview → PDF

tab7_excel_mapping.description: Upload đơn hàng khách + mẫu NCC → auto-map → xuất Excel

features: Google Font Picker with search, lazy loading
CSS custom property --custom-font for font override
!important override to cascade through Tailwind classes

patterns: ExcelJS merge: unmerge TRƯỚC spliceRows, re-merge SAU write data
ExcelJS cell.value → extractCellDisplayValue handles all object types
PromptHelper: shared component for system prompt copy-to-clipboard
Trilingual guide: same data structure for VN/EN/JP with accordion UI
DocToolbar: reusable toolbar with configurable accent color and optional features
GoogleFontPicker: lazy-load Google Fonts via API, 30+ curated fonts with CJK support
CSS custom property font override: .custom-font-active * { font-family: var(--custom-font) !important } — overrides Tailwind font-sans/font-serif
DOCX export via DOM walking: walkNode recursion → TextRun/Paragraph/Table/Heading
gotchas: Saved profiles cache old zone data → sanitize on load
Formula auto-adjustment too fragile → give user manual control
Tailwind font-sans/font-serif classes override container-level fontFamily → use CSS !important with custom property
useRef declared but not attached to DOM (ref={refName} missing) → ref.current always null → silent failures
DOCX export empty when printAreaRef.current is null — always verify ref is attached to DOM element
conventions: System prompts in src/utils/prompts.js as exported constants (CERT_PROMPT_TEXT, LEGAL_PROMPT_TEXT, LONG_DOC_TRANS_PROMPT)
Shared components: DocToolbar, GoogleFontPicker, PromptHelper, ZoneEditor
Tab views are self-contained with own translations
Tab icons: Lucide icon + emoji fallback when collapsed
Tab order: Certificate, Legal, EJV, Overlay, PDF Split, PDF Merge, Excel, Guide
Custom font state: const [customFont, setCustomFont] = useState(null) in each tab
